# CWE-603: server trusts client-sent authentication header without verification.
lang: go
file: CWE-603-vulnerable.go
---
package sample

import (
	"net/http"

	"github.com/gin-gonic/gin"
	"gorm.io/gorm"
)

func UpdateBilling(c *gin.Context, db *gorm.DB) {
	if c.GetHeader("X-Authenticated") != "true" {
		c.String(http.StatusUnauthorized, "login required")
		return
	}
	db.Exec("UPDATE billing SET plan = ? WHERE user_id = ?", c.PostForm("plan"), c.Param("id"))
	c.Status(http.StatusOK)
}
